title: wolftpm-tss lib.rs doctest requires tss feature to compile-check
description: The quick-start doctest in wolftpm-tss/src/lib.rs cannot use no_run (compile-check) because it imports tpm2_rs_client and tpm2_rs_base which are only available with --features tss. Current state: no_run,ignore (reverted from failed fix attempt). Proper fix: split into two doctests — one showing WolfTpmLinuxDev::open() without tss-specific types (always compile-checks), one with ignore showing the full tpm2_rs_client integration.
